questions.question:
A graceful-termination diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `lifecycle-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `lifecycle-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `lifecycle-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o wide`
- `terminationGraceCheck` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.terminationGracePeriodSeconds}'`
- `preStopTypeCheck` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command[0]}'`
- `preStopCommandCheck` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command[2]}'`
- `containerCommandCheck` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command[2]}'`
- `imageCheck` is `kubectl get deployment lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n lifecycle-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm lifecycle preStop commands and termination grace period before changing workload manifests or forcing pod deletion`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/lifecycle-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/lifecycle-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Lifecycle Hook Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete pods, do not restart the Deployment, and do not patch the live Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The lifecycle diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended deployment target, exact lifecycle inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact lifecycle and termination inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe lifecycle remediation guidance is removed
